_comment: Cross-language constants verified to agree today (architecture-hardening.md PKT-7 gate 3 / findings F7, F21). Consumers: crates/futo-notes-model/tests/conformance.rs (imageExtensions, maxTitleLength), apps/tauri/src-tauri/src/filesystem_watcher.rs's test module (watcherSuppressionWindowMs), src/lib/constantsConformance.test.ts (all fields). PKT-6/D4 (landed): the ext set is now unified on the canonical crates/futo-notes-core/src/image.rs (model::IMAGE_EXTENSIONS re-exports it); invariants.rs delegates and the tauri.ts picker derives from @futo-notes/shared, so both are no longer independent copies (see drift-registry.json image-extension-set).
